samples.raw_output:
SCORE: C1
EXPLANATION: The text has clear, well-structured texts of complex subjects: "As you know, Hurricane Melinda hits our region causing lot of damages of different nature." (clear, well-structured text of a complex subject: hurricane causing damages). "Let's volunteer today helping someone in need and let's do it all together, we have to set Carson County back on foot with our strenghts." (clear, well-structured text of a complex subject: volunteering and setting back). "Specifically, volunteer jobs include: * Prepare Disaster Kits for victims (kits include blankets, canned and dried food, water, first aid kit, toilet paper); * Gathering and distributing food and basic supplies for the shelters.; * Construction Work (no previous experience is needed); * Blood Donation (there are plenty of people hospitalized!); * Debris removal (especially in order to help emergency vehicles to pass through streets more easily); * Counseling; * Financial Assistance, especially if you don't have time to volunteer you can consider to donate money to our disaster relief fund; * Advocacy (in other words, help spread the word about this natural disaster so that we could raise more help); * Guidance through financial and career advice so that victims can get their lives back on track." (clear, well-structured text of complex subjects: volunteer jobs). "Thanks in advance for your help!%%" (clear, well-structured text: conclusion). The text expands and supports points of view at some length with subsidiary points, reasons, and relevant examples: the list of volunteer jobs has subsidiary points (each job), reasons (purpose), relevant examples (kits, food, supplies, work, donation, removal, counseling, assistance, advocacy, guidance). It rounds off with an appropriate conclusion: "Thanks in advance for your help!%%" is an appropriate conclusion.
CONFIDENCE: 0.85
